## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo test -- --test-threads=1` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` has no warnings
- [ ] New tools added to `WRITE_TOOLS` list if they modify data
- [ ] Tool table in `README.md` updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No hardcoded instance names, tokens, or sensitive data
